overall_status: UNITED STATES FORZINITY ACCELERATED APPROVAL EXISTS FOR A DEFINED BARTH-SYNDROME INDICATION — CATALOGUE SS-31 POWDER IS NOT AUTHORISED-PRODUCT EQUIVALENT

regulatory_records.current_status: Forzinity received accelerated approval on 19 September 2025 to improve muscle strength in adult and paediatric patients with Barth syndrome weighing at least 30 kg. The catalogue powder is not the authorised product.
regulatory_records.next_review_trigger: Identity, approval, label, confirmatory trial, safety, enforcement or anti-doping change

regulatory_records.current_status: A phase 3b/4 confirmatory trial is registered to verify clinical benefit following accelerated approval.
regulatory_records.next_review_trigger: Identity, approval, label, confirmatory trial, safety, enforcement or anti-doping change

regulatory_records.current_status: Elamipretide has a positive orphan designation for Barth syndrome; orphan designation is not marketing authorisation.

regulatory_records.current_status: An agreed paediatric investigation plan was published in March 2026; this is not a United Kingdom marketing authorisation.
